# Code Review Workflow

Prerequisite: Read and follow `authoring-ground-rules.md` before applying this rule.

Every pull request MUST be reviewed before merging.

---

## Requirements

1. **Request review** — the PR author MUST request review from at least one team member.
2. **Address all comments** — the author MUST respond to every review comment before merging.
3. **Re-request after changes** — after addressing feedback, the author MUST re-request review.

---

## MUST NOT

- Do not merge without at least one approval.
- Do not dismiss review comments without discussion.
- Do not self-approve pull requests.
